alt: Video by Olectra on July 13, 2026. May be an image of motorcycle, road and text that says 'Olectra The Olectra TheOlectraRoute: Route: Himalayas'.
caption:
A journey built on endurance, a legacy built on reliability.

For over 8 years, 25 Olectra electric buses have served the Manali to Rohtang route, navigating steep climbs, sharp turns and extreme weather at 13,000 feet above mean sea level.

With 48 lakh+ kilometres travelled and counting, every journey continues to prove the strength of electric mobility in the Himalayas.

A journey that continues to demonstrate the performance and reliability of electric mobility at greater heights.

#Olectra #TheOlectraRoute #Himalayas #TransformingEveryday

alt: Video by Olectra on May 27, 2026. May be an image of bus and text that says 'Olectra Ergonomically designed seating for a comfortable and relaxing ride Comfortable Comfortablejourneys. journeys, happy moments Transforming Everyday'.
caption:
Ergonomically designed seating isn’t just about aesthetics; it’s about transforming the passenger experience.

Our vision is that every commute should be an effortless blend of relaxation and safety. Discover the joy of smooth, stress-free travel with our forward-thinking electric fleet.

#Olectra #ComfortableJourneys #TransformingEveryDay

alt: Video by Olectra on May 28, 2026. May be an image of bus, shuttle bus and text.
caption:
Driving Towards a Greener Hyderabad!

Olectra is proud to announce another major step forward in the transition toward sustainable public transport. As part of our ongoing commitment to clean energy, a new batch of 60, 12-meter low-floor Olectra electric buses has been officially deployed for Hyderabad city commuters.

The official flag-off ceremony took place at the Kukatpally depot, led by the Telangana Transport Minister, Sri Ponnam Prabhakar, alongside TGSRTC leadership and esteemed public representatives.

At Olectra, we remain focused on engineering reliable, zero-emission mass transit solutions that contribute to a cleaner, healthier future.

#Olectra #TransformingEveryDay #ElectricBuses  #Hyderabad #TGSRTC

alt: Video by Olectra on April 30, 2026. May be an image of car, bus, truck and poster.
caption:
Every electric vehicle on the road is, first and foremost, a human achievement.

Behind the technology is a driver who trusts it, an engineer who perfects it, an operator who maintains it, and a workforce that believes in it.

On this International Workforce Day, we acknowledge the people who keep Olectra moving.

#InternationalWorkforceDay #Olectra #TransformingEveryday #ElectricVehicles

Progress starts with the right principles.

At the intersection of vision and reality, progress begins to take shape. It’s where Pragmatic Futurism meets real-world needs, where Accessible Innovation turns ideas into scalable solutions, and where a Trusted Guide brings clarity to complexity. Driven by responsible, purpose-led core leadership and powered by adaptive, technology-driven performance innovation, we build with intent and deliver with impact. 

At the heart of it all is our human side—inclusive, citizen-centric, confident, and optimistic. Because true transformation doesn’t just imagine the future—it makes it work, every single day.

#Olectra #TransformingEveryday #InnovationWithPurpose #NextGenMobility

Olectra is proud to partner with one of India's most revered Temple destination - Sri Varaha Lakshmi Narasimha Swamyvari Devasthanam (SVLNSD) in #Simhachalam, #AndhraPradesh. Olectra has delivered state-of-the-art, zero-emission #electric buses to the Devasthanam. These e-buses, with a seating capacity of 41, will ferry devotees #sustainably from the foothills of the Simhachalam hills to the #temple atop. The eco-friendly e-buses will significantly reduce air and noise pollution along the route, preserving the rich biodiversity of the Simhachalam hills ensuring efficient and reliable transportation for devotees. 

#vizag #vizagcity #simhachalamtemple #vizagtourism
